name: Daedong Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Daedong Steel Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells steel products. It offers hot-rolled coil, plate, and skelp products; hot-rolled steel plates; and cold-rolled coils/cold-rolled steel plates, electrical galvanized/galvanized steel plates, hot-dip galvanized steel/pickled and oiled steel products, as well as other products. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Seoul, South Korea.
